name: liminal-agents
description: A CLI surface on the Liminal substrate. A background daemon ingests local signals; Architect, Witness, and Contrarian read them; your correction becomes data. Four canonical tables, nine canonical correction tags, and a correction stream that never converges. Built for Cerebral Valley x Anthropic Built with Opus 4.7 hackathon.

anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key (starts with sk-). Only required if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set in your shell environment.
